overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game (Starfield) showing a character in a white coat exploring a futuristic, sterile spacecraft interior. The character moves from a small private bathroom through a corridor into a larger common area with kitchen facilities and public restroom stalls, featuring metallic surfaces, artificial lighting, and clean geometric architecture throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: small private bathroom with sink and mirror

agents.ego_description: standing in a compact bathroom, facing the sink and mirror with minimal movement

entered.detail: white ceramic sink with faucet mounted on dark metal wall
rectangular mirror with metal frame above the sink
metal bar with white towel hanging on the left wall
bright rectangular ceiling light illuminating the small space
small dark container on the floor near the wall

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a narrow, enclosed bathroom with dark metal walls and a single overhead light. A wall-mounted sink with a metal mirror and a towel rack are visible directly ahead, while the character remains mostly stationary, observing the small space.

events.description: exits the small bathroom into a narrow corridor with wall-mounted shelves and a potted plant

agents.ego_description: walking out of the bathroom doorway into the connecting corridor

entered.detail: white pot with pink flowers sitting on the floor against the right wall
blue floating shelves mounted on the right wall with small items
large circular metal door frame leading to the next area

segments.scene_description: The character exits the bathroom into a narrow corridor featuring wall-mounted blue shelves and a potted plant with pink flowers. A large circular doorway is visible at the end of the short corridor as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: crew kitchenette with cabinets and countertops

agents.ego_description: walking through the kitchen area, passing white cabinets and examining the countertops

large round window showing exterior space view

wall-mounted dispenser with white towels next to the sink

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious common area featuring a kitchenette with white cabinetry and black countertops. A large circular window on the left shows the exterior, while blue chairs sit against the far wall. The character moves steadily through the room, passing the kitchen sink and various wall-mounted fixtures.

scene_state.functional_zone: public restroom with multiple toilet stalls

slows and stops briefly to look at the row of restroom stalls

agents.ego_description: approaching the restroom stalls and examining the facilities at the end of the room

stall on the right side with similar fixtures and metal partitions
floor-to-ceiling metal dividers separating the toilet stalls
closed metal door at the far end of the restroom area

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the kitchen into a restroom area featuring multiple toilet stalls separated by metal partitions. Three stalls are visible through open doorways, each with visible fixtures and grab bars. The character approaches a closed metal door at the far end while examining the facilities.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, private utility space into an expansive, sterile common area of a spacecraft. It begins within a narrow, enclosed bathroom characterized by dark metal walls and a single overhead light reflecting off a wall-mounted mirror. As the character exits the room, the space opens into a short corridor lined with blue shelves and a potted plant with pink flowers, leading directly toward a large circular doorway. The scene then expands into a spacious common area featuring a white and black kitchenette and a large circular window revealing the exterior, while the camera glides past blue chairs and wall-mounted fixtures. Finally, the movement carries the character past the kitchen and into a public restroom area with metal partitions and multiple stalls before approaching a closed metal door at the far end.
